case_title: OPORTUN INC. (FORMERLY PROGRESS FINANCIAL CORP.) VS. WIFREDO A LESCANO

docket_entries.description: WRIT RETURNED WRIT OF EXECUTION ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY, RETURNED AND FILED, PARTIALLY SATISFIED IN THE SUM OF $667.69 FOR THE WRIT ISSUED: 07/26/2017 AS TO DEFENDANT LESCANO, WIFREDO A

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUL-13-2016 - JUDGMENT.
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, AS TO DEFENDANT LESCANO, WIFREDO A

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JUL-13-2016 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JUL-13-2016 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF'S REPRESENTATIVE DONNA FLORES ALBERTO, LEGAL COLLECTIONS SPECIALIST FOR OPORTUN INC. NO APPEARANCE BY DEFENDANT WILFREDO A. LESCANO. PROOF OF SERVICE IN THE FILE. EXHIBITS NOT RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: K. DOUGHERTY. NOT REPORTED. (D506).

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF OPORTUN INC. (FORMERLY PROGRESS FINANCIAL CORP.) RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT LESCANO, WIFREDO A $462.69 PRINCIPAL, $145.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $607.69 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
